english: pudent. - 2. measure, instrument for measuring, ču-tsód (chu tshod) water-clock. - 3. division, portion, quantity, tsod-čig (tshod cig) part, *nor tsod čig* (nor tshod cig) part of the money, of the estate W.; esp. of time, point of time, certain hour, cf. ču-tsod (chu tshod) and dus-tsod (dus tshod); *duṅ pǔ-če tsód-la* (dung phu che tshod la) W. at the time when the signal with the trumpet is given; *tsam tsod* (tsam tshod) W., at which hour? - 4. estimation, supposition, conjecture, guess; ṅai tsod - la (ngai tshod la) according to my estimation, tsod ͦdzin-pa (tshod 'dzin pa) v. above; *dha léb-pe tsọ' yo'* (dha leb pe tsho' yo') by this time he will have arrived, I guess C.; hence *tsod-če* (tshod ce) W. to guess; tsód-šes (tshod shes), tsód-bya (tshod bya) riddle Cs., tsód-šes smrá-ba (tshod shes smra ba) to propose a riddle, mi-tsod (mi tshod) about men, bem-tsód (bem tshod) about inanimate objects Cs.(?); *tsod-tsód* (tshod tshod) W. at random Sch. - 5. tsod (tshod) affixed to an adj. serves to form abstract nouns, thus: rnyéd-par dká-tsód (rnyed par dka tshod) the difficulty of obtaining, ͦjíg-par slá-tsod ('jig par sla tshod) the facility of destroying, p'an - ͦdógs čé-tsod (phan 'dogs che tshod) the greatness of the advantage Thgy.

1. vegetables, greens, tsód-ma rgod-skyés (tshod ma rgod skyes) Cs.: wild-growing greens, frequently gathered by the Tibetans in spring-time, such as dandelion, nettles, Eremurus etc.; tsód-ma yyuṅ-skyés (tshod ma g-yung skyes) Cs. cultivated vegetables. - 2. boiled greens, vejetable-soup Mil. and vulgo. - sṅo-tsód (sngo tshod) = tsód-ma (tshod ma); nyuṅ-tsód (nyung tshod) a dish of roots, turnips etc. Cs.; ldum-tsód (ldum tshod) a variety of roots Cs.(?) - lo-tsód (lo tshod) all sorts of cabbage; ša-tsód (sha tshod) Cs., 'meat', (?) or more probably: prepared mushrooms. - tsod-sdér (tshod sder) plate, dish Sch.

I. (cf. tso-ba (tsho ba) and tsos (tshos)) colour, 1. colouring matter, paint, = tsón-rtsi (tshon rtsi), or rtsi-tsón (rtsi tshon); tsón-rtsi dkár-pos ͦbrí-ba (tshon rtsi dkar pos 'bri ba) to mark with white paint; ͦbyúg-pa ('byug pa) to paint; tson lén-pa (tshon len pa) to take, imbibe colour Cs.; tson sbyór-ba (tshon sbyor ba) to mix, to prepare colours Cs.; tsón-gyis btso-ba (tshon gyis btso ba) to colour, to dye; tson-skúd (tshon skud) dyed thread Do.; tson-spél (tshon spel) a coloured strip W. - 2. colour = mdog (mdog) W. - II. v. mtsón (mtshon).
1. fat, plump, well-fed W., C. 2. resinous.

I. also tsóm-po (tshom po) Cs. bundle, bunch, tsóm-bu (tshom bu) id., mé-tog-gi tsóm-bu (me tog gi tshom bu) bunch of flowers Pth.; rṅá-ma nág-poi tsóm-pa btágs-pa (rnga ma nag poi tshom pa btags pa) Mil., a kind of collar, made of black yak's tail; pra-tsóm (pra tshom) a border or trimming set with jewels or pearls. Acc. to our authorities, however, the word properly signifies a mixture or variety of colours, something variegated, gay-coloured, e.g. *dii náṅ-du tsom máṅ-po* (dii nang du tshom mang po) there is much colouring in this, it is manycoloured, *tsom-tsóm* (tshom tshom) id. - II. vb. to doubt, hesitate; to be timid, bashful, shy; to be ashamed C.; sbst. doubt, timidity etc.; tsom-tsóm (tshom tshom), tsam-tsóm (tsam tshom), te-tsóm (the tshom) id.

C., W. 1. = kyams (khyams), also tsoms-skór (tshoms skor) court-yard, kaṅ-pai tsoms (khang pai tshoms) Lex. - 2. set, division, part, chapter Sch., so perh. in the title of a book, čéd-du brjód-pai tsoms (ched du brjod pai tshoms) Thgy.; *kye-ča yu daṅ zii tsóm-čan* (kye cha yu dang zii tshom can) W. a neck-lace or string of pearls in sets, divided by turkois-drops and yzi (gzi).

1. to perceive, sbst. perception; as one of the five skandhas =, a sensation, a feeling; to perceive, yžán gyis ma tsór-bar (gzhan gyis ma tshor bar) without any one perceiving it Dzl.; also without yžán-gyis (gzhan gyis): ma tsór-bar rkú-ba (ma tshor bar rku ba) to steal unobserved, the contrary to robbing forcibly Thgy.; *žim-po tsor* (zhim po tshor) he found it well-tasted; sbrúm-pa tsór-nas (sbrum pa tshor nas) feeling herself to be with child Pth.; *yáṅ-mo tsor soṅ* (yang mo tshor song) W. it felt light to the touch. - 2. to hear, for tós-pa (thos pa), common in W. -

1. paint, dye, colouring matter; tsos rgyág-pa (tshos rgyag pa), rgyáb-pa (rgyab pa) to dye, to colour Sch.; tsos gyur (tshos gyur) (or log (log)) soṅ (song) it has lost colour, it is faded; tsós(-kyi) kŭ(-ba) (tshos kyi khu ba) liquid paint, = tsón-rtsi (tshon rtsi) Glr.; tsós-mk'an (tshos mkhan) dyer, tsos-lu (tshos lu) Sch.: a cosmetic, wash(?); rgyá-tsos (rgya tshos) a red pigment from India, perh. kermes Med. - 2. a medicament Med. - 3. v. kúr-tsos (kur tshos), ͦpóṅ-tsos ('phong tshos).
